attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY BK_PRODUCT_KEY,
CASE
WHEN BK_TRIANGULATION_TYPE_CD IN('WWDisti SL3 Mapped to SL2 and Valid Countries','WWDisti SL3 Mapped to SL2 and Invalid/Unknown Countries','WWDisti SL3 Mapped to SL2 and UNKNOWN Countries') THEN 1
WHEN BK_TRIANGULATION_TYPE_CD IN('DirectTheater SL3 No Match and SL2 Match and UNKNOWN Countries','Valid Country and Segment combination available in CCM','Valid Country and UNKNOWN/InValid Segment combination available in CCM','UNKNOWN/InValid Country with Valid Segment and Theater combination in CCM','UNKNOWN/InValid Country and  Segment with Valid Theater combination in CCM','TAC SSC-CCM Theater,Country and SCMS are blank/UNKNOWN/InValid')
THEN 2
WHEN BK_TRIANGULATION_TYPE_CD IN('DirectTheater SL3 match and UNKNOWN Countries','DirectTheater SL3 No Match and SL2 Match and Valid Countries','DirectTheater SL3 No Match and SL2 Match and InValid Countries','TAC Non-Triangulated data','TAC WW Disti- SL3 not mapped','DirectTheater SL3 match and Valid Countries','DirectTheater SL3 match and InValid Countries','Service Cogs Historical Manual Upload','SSC Non Triangulated Data','SSC WWDISTI SL3 Not Matched','SSC - Match on C3 SCMS and Sales.SCMS between Source and Driver') THEN 3
WHEN BK_TRIANGULATION_TYPE_CD='DirectTheater Valid /Invalid/UNKNOWN Countries with Misc SL3/Non Misc not matching at SL3 and SL2' THEN 10
ELSE -999
END DV_TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT ,
CASE WHEN DV_TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT IN(1,2,3)
THEN TRIANGULATED_SALES_TERR_KEY
ELSE ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
TRIANGULATED_SALES_TERR_KEY BK_TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL( COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT)),
DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,
DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
FROM
(
/* TAC START*/ /*TAC_TBO_COGS_AMOUNT*/
SELECT
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY
,BK_TRIANGULATION_TYPE_CD
,ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,TRIANGULATED_SALES_TERR_KEY
,SUM(TAC_TBO_COGS_AMOUNT) * (-1) COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT
,CAST('TS Centralized Direct' AS VARCHAR(100)) DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME  /* AS PART OF CX-PNL TSS COGS ICPM Q1FY20 */
,DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
FROM (
SELECT
FY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,GL.SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY
,BK_TRIANGULATION_TYPE_CD
,ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,TRIANGULATED_SALES_TERR_KEY
,SUM(GL.TAC_THTR_BUZ_OPRTN_CST_USD_AMT) (DECIMAL(18,6)) TAC_TBO_COGS_AMOUNT
,CAST(TRIM(COALESCE(GL.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) ||'~'|| TRIM(COALESCE(GL.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) ||'~'||-9999||'~'||-9999 AS VARCHAR(70)) DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_TSS_TECH_ASST_CTR_CGS_TRGLTN GL
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_PNL_MTH_CNTL_TSS_COGS_RTM FY
ON GL.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=FY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
WHERE BK_ST_ENRCHMNT_MTHDLGY_CD = 'Direct' 
/* AND GL.BK_TRIANGULATION_TYPE_CD IN ('CX Americas','CX APJC','CX EMEAR') */
AND FY.RUN_BATCH_ID=3
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD

) TAC2 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
/* TAC END */
UNION
/* TAC START*/ /*TAC_OH_COGS_AMOUNT*/
SELECT
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY
,BK_TRIANGULATION_TYPE_CD
,ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,TRIANGULATED_SALES_TERR_KEY
,SUM(TAC_OH_COGS_AMOUNT) * (-1) COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT
,CAST('TS Centralized Indirect' AS VARCHAR(100)) DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME  /* AS PART OF CX-PNL TSS COGS ICPM Q1FY20 */
,DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
FROM (
SELECT
FY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY
,BK_TRIANGULATION_TYPE_CD
,ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,TRIANGULATED_SALES_TERR_KEY
,SUM(GL.TAC_OVERHEAD_COST_USD_AMT) * GL.TAC_ADJUSTED_OVERHEAD_PCT/100 (DECIMAL(18,6)) TAC_OH_COGS_AMOUNT
,CAST(TRIM(COALESCE(GL.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) ||'~'|| TRIM(COALESCE(GL.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) ||'~'||-9999||'~'||-9999 AS VARCHAR(70)) DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_TSS_TECH_ASST_CTR_CGS_TRGLTN GL
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_PNL_MTH_CNTL_TSS_COGS_RTM FY
ON GL.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=FY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
WHERE BK_ST_ENRCHMNT_MTHDLGY_CD = 'Indirect'
/* AND GL.BK_TRIANGULATION_TYPE_CD IN ('Chief OF Staff','GLOBAL Centers','Headquarters','Operations','Platforms','Product Management',
'Strategy AND Portfolio','CX Americas','CX APJC','CX EMEAR') */
AND FY.RUN_BATCH_ID=3
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,TAC_ADJUSTED_OVERHEAD_PCT,DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
) TAC3 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD/* TAC END */

)ABC GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,8,DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
